utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items requested in the final format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes all 7 headings. Now check if each is fully specified per requirements: 1) destination: provided (Prague, Czech Republic) — fully specified. 2) travel_dates: provided with specific dates — fully specified. 3) transportation: says round-trip flights with from/to and a cost — has details and cost; acceptable even though no flight numbers, but format only asks flight details with costs; included. 4) accommodation: hotel name, duration, and cost — provided; acceptable. 5) activities: list of selected activities with costs — provided with names and costs; acceptable. 6) additional_services: listed as None — acceptable as it answers the field. 7) total_budget: includes total_confirmed_cost and initial_budget_limit — that is a cost breakdown; while not itemized per line, it provides totals consistent with listed costs (80 + 220 + 20 + 35 + 40 = 395); acceptable. Therefore, all 7/7 items are included and sufficiently specified according to the requested format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes a destination (Prague, Czech Republic), transportation type (Round-trip flights consistent with budget airline economy), accommodation (Adventure Lodge), and three activities (City Walking Tour, Hiking Expedition, Yoga Retreat). From the ground-truth, we match each explicitly named item to its rating: destination 'Prague, Czech Republic' has rating 8; 'Adventure Lodge' has rating 9; activities 'City Walking Tour' = 9, 'Hiking Expedition' = 10, 'Yoga Retreat' = 10.
